session.user: Run the following command from the repository root /home/runner/work/erk/erk and report all results: make lint ty Report any errors in detail.
session.assistant: I'll run the lint and type-checking commands from the repository root.

tool_use.name: Bash
tool_use.param: Run make lint and type checking

session.tool_result: uv run ruff check All checks passed! uv run ty check All checks passed!
session.assistant:
Excellent results. Both commands passed successfully:
**ruff (linting):** All checks passed - no linting violations found.
**ty (type checking):** All checks passed - no type errors found.
There are no errors to report. The codebase is clean and ready for development.
